title: Volume I — Doctrine and Practice (Sample)
subtitle: Preface to the four-volume set, plus the opening sections of Chapter 1: The Field of Sports Law.

title: Volume II — Cases (Sample)
subtitle: Editor's note + opening of the first foundational case in the volume: Federal Baseball Club v. National League (1922) — the case that created the baseball antitrust exemption.

title: Volume III — Document Bank (Sample)
subtitle: Opening of Form A-1: the long-form endorsement agreement between an athlete and a sponsor. Volume III contains 60+ forms; this is the most-used.

title: Volume IV — Governance, Statutes & Authorities (Sample)
subtitle: Opening of the Sherman Antitrust Act as it appears in Volume IV. The full volume reproduces every major federal statute, state NIL statute, league CBA, and NCAA Manual article in full.

title: Practitioner's Guide (Sample)
subtitle: Opening of Chapter 1: Understanding Athletes. This is the practitioner's companion volume to the four-volume reference set.
